texto: My name it means nothingmy fortune is lessMy future is shrouded in dark wildernessSunshine is far away, clouds linger onEverything I posessed - Now they are goneOh where can I go to and what can I do?Nothing can please me only thoughts are of youYou just laughed when I begged you to stayI've not stopped crying since you went awayThe world is a lonely place when you're on your ownGuess I will go home - sit down and moan.Crying and thinking is all that I doMemories I have remind me of you
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Black Sabbath que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “My name it means nothingmy fortune is lessMy future is shrouded in dark wildernessSunshine is far…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, solitude, crying, com foco em reflexao-noturna e reflexao.
